expected.title: OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events

text:
The unresolved Sentry issue with the highest event count is **SENTRY-3049** ("OOMKilled: Migrate auth to OAuth2 + PKCE") with **4,422 events**.

I sent an email to `oncall@acme.io`:
- **Subject:** Top error
- **Body:** OOMKilled: Migrate auth to OAuth2 + PKCE
- **Status:** sent (ID: msg-out-1)

tool_calls.name: email__send_email
tool_calls.input: {"to":"oncall@acme.io","subject":"Top error","body":"OOMKilled: Migrate auth to OAuth2 + PKCE"}
